svg.title: LQoSync lqosync-in-rust branch: full workflow and logic map
svg.desc: Shows the stable architecture from Flask UI shell into the Rust authority daemon, collector transport adapters, Rust transaction path, and LibreQoS

g.text: Config, dashboard, dry run, policy center, backups, logs, operations
Always delegates to Rust scheduler authority daemon daemon
Rust authorizes; compatibility bridge executes only under Rust gates
Rust authority daemon (lqosync-core) — Unix socket / JSON protocol
Rust transaction → atomic write → journal → rollback
Reads ShapedDevices.csv + network.json, applies TC shaping
Rust authority promotion pipeline (collector authority handoff)
pilot → dry-run → selection → activation → runtime → switch
Rust is canonical authority; Python is Flask UI shell only.
